payload.subject: The $22M round + doubling sales headcount
payload.body: Sarah — congrats on the Series B. Companies that double sales headcount in 90 days usually hit a wall around month 4 when the tooling can't keep up with rep volume. Apollo solves exactly that. 15 minutes this week?
payload.htmlBody: Sarah — congrats on the Series B. Companies that double sales headcount in 90 days usually hit a wall around month 4 when the tooling can't keep up with rep volume. Apollo solves exactly that. 15 minutes this week?
payload.triggerSignal: $22M Series B closed March 28th, earmarked for GTM expansion — CEO publicly stated plans to double sales org in 90 days.

preview: Send cold email to Sarah Chen at Meridian Analytics

payload.subject: ShieldLayer's RevOps role + 'migration from legacy tools'
payload.body: Ryan — saw the RevOps Analyst posting asking for 'experience migrating from legacy sales engagement tools'. That's a rare signal. If Outreach is the legacy tool in question, happy to walk you through what the switch looks like in practice. Worth 20 minutes?
payload.htmlBody: Ryan — saw the RevOps Analyst posting asking for 'experience migrating from legacy sales engagement tools'. That's a rare signal. If Outreach is the legacy tool in question, happy to walk you through what the switch looks like in practice. Worth 20 minutes?
payload.triggerSignal: Job posting explicitly requests 'experience with migration from legacy sales engagement tools and evaluation of Apollo, Salesloft, or Outreach alternatives'.

preview: Send cold email to Ryan Kosta at ShieldLayer Security

payload.subject: Tripling a sales team in 6 months — the part nobody warns you about
payload.body: Priya — the $40M Series C announcement mentioned tripling the sales team from 15 to 45 reps. The tooling decision you make in month 1 determines whether month 6 is chaos or compound growth. 15 minutes to show you how teams your size have done it?
payload.htmlBody: Priya — the $40M Series C announcement mentioned tripling the sales team from 15 to 45 reps. The tooling decision you make in month 1 determines whether month 6 is chaos or compound growth. 15 minutes to show you how teams your size have done it?
payload.triggerSignal: $40M Series C announced with explicit plan to triple sales team from 15 to 45 reps within 6 months.
